scripts.lint: pnpm exec oxlint -c oxlint.config.ts . && pnpm exec oxfmt --check . && node scripts/lint-tokens.js
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui-astro/tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir apps/docs typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm --dir apps/docs build && pnpm exec pagefind --site apps/docs/dist --output-path apps/docs/dist/_pagefind
scripts.validate: pnpm run check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
